name: Expanded quotes track stays expanded across data refresh
description: /quotes shows three numbered tracks (Out for response / Drafting / Decided this month), all collapsed by default per the canonical reference. When the user expands one and a sibling island triggers a dash-cache refresh, the expanded state must NOT collapse back. The track island owns its own UI state independently of the data refresh cycle.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Wants to see what's awaiting response without losing the expanded view when a quote opens an email and the activity feed pulses.

preconditions: Account has 3+ sent quotes in 'Out for response' track

steps.expect: All three tracks are collapsed; counts render in the header

steps.action: Clicks the 'Out for response' track header
steps.expect: Track expands; aria-expanded=true; quote cards are visible

steps.action: Sibling island triggers refreshDash() (e.g. via subscribeDash listener)
steps.expect: Track stays expanded; counts may update in the header but state is preserved
Tracks return to collapsed (default state — expansion is in-memory, not persisted, by design)

evaluationCriteria.check: Chevron rotation animates with the same cubic-bezier as elsewhere; no jump on data refresh
User feels their interaction is sticky during a session — they can investigate without losing place
QuoteTrack uses local useState for open/closed; data props can change without remounting and resetting
aria-expanded toggles in sync with visible state; focus stays on the header button after activation
